projectDescription: An internal capital investment and memo request management system with multi-step approval workflows, role-based access control, and PDF export for HVD.
keyFeatures: Capital investment request (SIC) creation and management with detailed cost breakdowns
Multi-step approval workflow with configurable approver roles
Role-based access control using Filament Shield (super_admin, originator, approver)
Email and in-app notifications at each approval workflow step
PDF export for approved and rejected requests via signed URLs
Dashboard with monthly request charts and status overview widgets
Company, department, and cost center organizational hierarchy
Request options (A/B/C/D budget classification) for capital requests
Dockerized deployment with FrankenPHP/Octane for high performance
publicApiSurface: GET /local-currency-requests/{id}/pdf — Signed URL to download capital request PDF
GET /memo-request/{id}/pdf — Signed URL to download memo request PDF
Filament panel at /sic_hvd — Main admin panel (requires authentication)
RequestStatus enum: draft, pending, approved, returned, rejected, resubmitted
ReviewStatus enum: return, reject, approved, pending, submitted, resubmitted
ApprovalNotification::notifyApprovers(Model, Collection, ?User) — Notify approvers of pending requests
ApprovalNotification::notifyOriginator(Model, string, ?string, ?User) — Notify request originator of decisions
RequestOptions::definitions() — Returns A/B/C/D budget option definitions
